machine_end_gcode:
; Starting Ending Script 
G92 E0
G91 ; set all axes to relative
G1 Z20 ; move Z axis 20mm
G90 ; set all axes to absolute
G28 Y ; home Y axis
Endposition
M106 P1 S0 ; deactivate tool fan T1 (v1)
M106 P0 S0 ; deactivate tool fan T0 (v1)
M84 ; disable all steppers
M107 P0 ; deactivate tool fan T0 (v1)
M107 P1 ; deactivate tool fan T1
M104 T0 S0
M104 T1 S0
M141 S0; set chamber temperature
LIGHT_ON
M140 S0 ; turn off heated bed
T0
; Ending Script
machine_start_gcode:
;STARTSCRIPT EL-140V3 v.1.1
T0
bed_mesh_clear
G92 E0
M141 S[chamber_temperature] ; Start der Kammerheizung
M140 S{first_layer_bed_temperature[initial_tool]} ; Heize Bett
G28
M190 S{first_layer_bed_temperature[initial_tool]} ; Warte auf Bett
G1 Z10 F480
G1 X200 Y200 F10000
G1 Z2 F480
M109 T0 S150
BRUSH_ACTIVE_NOZZLE
MEASURE_TILT
G28 Z
T0
BED_MESH_CALIBRATE
G28 P
; === Heize nur verwendete Düsen ===
{if is_extruder_used[0]}M104 T0 S{first_layer_temperature[0]}{endif}
{if is_extruder_used[1]}M104 T1 S{first_layer_temperature[1]}{endif}

; === Deaktiviere nicht verwendete Düsen ===
{if not is_extruder_used[0]}M104 T0 S0{endif}
{if not is_extruder_used[1]}M104 T1 S0{endif}

; === Warte auf aktive Düsen ===
G4 S150

M107 P1 ; Gehäuselüfter aus
M107 P0 ; Tool-Lüfter aus

; === Aktives Werkzeug setzen ===
T{initial_tool}
G90 ; absolute Positionierung
name: EL-140V3 v.2.0
